context: Tests understanding of the hook lifecycle from event firing through script execution and JSON output

checklist.name: Hook event and structure
checklist.description: Explains UserPromptSubmit fires on each user prompt, hooks.json structure with command type, ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} resolution, and 5-second timeout.

checklist.name: Script flow walkthrough
checklist.description: Walks through suggest-optimize.sh steps: HEAD tracking (/tmp/.codeflash-last-suggested), duplicate check, git diff for .py files, pyproject.toml check, runner detection, jq output.

checklist.name: Failure diagnosis
checklist.description: Identifies likely causes: stale HEAD tracker file, script not executable (chmod +x), jq not installed, no Python files in the specific diff range, PREV commit not ancestor of HEAD.

checklist.name: Output format knowledge
checklist.description: Describes the JSON output format: hookSpecificOutput with hookEventName and additionalContext containing <user-prompt-submit-hook> wrapped message.
